title: It's a Girl Pink Plastic Cake Picks (12cm) Pack of 8 - Adorable Baby Shower Decorations
availability_text: Only 7 left in stock (more on the way).
features: IT'S A GIRL CAKE PICKS: Celebrate the arrival of your little princess with our unique and adorable "It's a Girl" pink plastic cake picks, perfect for adding a special touch to your baby shower or gender reveal party's dessert table.
PACK OF 8: This set includes 8 high-quality, 12cm long pink cake picks, ensuring you have enough decorations to adorn multiple cakes, cupcakes, or even as charming table centerpieces for your event.

MADE OF DURABLE PLASTIC: Our baby shower cake picks are crafted from sturdy plastic material, offering durability and longevity, making them reusable for future events or as keepsakes for the expectant parents.

EASY TO USE: Simply insert these eye-catching pink cake picks into your baked goodies and instantly transform them into memorable and Instagram-worthy baby shower treats, impressing your guests and creating lasting memories.

ADORABLE BABY SHOWER DECOR: Complement your baby shower theme with these irresistible "It's a Girl" cake picks, adding a festive and delightful ambiance to the celebration while providing an excellent conversation starter for your friends and family.
description: Product Description Make your cake look beautiful and eye-catching with these cake toppers featuring an "It's A Girl" headline in pink color. These cake toppers will make your party cake memorable. Safety Warning Caution: This item is not a toy. Not suitable for use by children. For decorative use only. Wash in warm, soapy water before each use. Box Contains 8 x IT'S A GIRL PINK CAKE PICKS See more
